user_system_path: Master Audit #445, gem-surfacing (the product-quality core). Diagnosed why the engine fires daily but delivers nothing: the artifactability taxonomy (lib/briefing/artifact-taste-pack.ts) ranked deadline/calendar/admin reminders as tier_1 'gems' and hardcoded relationship insight (relationship_risk_silence) to tier_3 + blocked it — inverted from the product's value (owner: 'surface gems, not a calendar reminder'). Fix: a relationship-silence candidate GROUNDED in a real recent two-way thread (>=2 source facts within 14 days) is promoted to tier_2 and unblocked; vague/stale ones stay suppressed. Deterministic proof shipped (gem-tiering.test.ts + 812-test briefing suite + typecheck green). Live/paid validation is the OWNER gate. Constraint: NO paid API calls from here.
allowed_files_raw: Gem-surfacing: the one taste-pack tiering file + its discernment test + the doctrine doc + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, schema, or deps. Only the named brain file; broader generator changes are separate, paid-validated seams.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/briefing/__tests__/gem-tiering.test.ts && npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/ && npm run typecheck
required_product_proof: OWNER live/paid validation: deploy, run one daily generation cycle with Anthropic credits, confirm the surfaced card is a real relationship gem (not noise). BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT until then.
required_browser_proof: N/A — backend selection-tier logic, not a UI surface. Product proof is the live generation run (see required_product_proof).
acceptance_condition: Grounded relationship gems are promoted to tier_2 and unblocked while vague/stale stay suppressed (gem-tiering.test.ts green), no regression in the briefing suite (812 green) or typecheck, doctrine recorded in docs/GEM_SURFACING.md, findings in #445. Live trust gated on owner paid validation.
anti_regression_checks: full briefing suite 812 green + typecheck clean; only artifact-taste-pack.ts changed under lib/
stop_condition: Stop when the gem-surfacing change is up as a PR with deterministic proof, marked BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on owner paid validation.
next_command: Owner: deploy + run one generation cycle (credits exist) and confirm the surfaced card is a real gem. If noise, tighten grounding (require high-value entity / explicit open loop). Then revisit the broader tier re-ordering (insight density > artifact shape).
